eventSubtitle: Users earn Event Points by purchasing coins during the event period.
rules:
• Event Duration
  1. 7 Days Event
  • Users earn Event Points by purchasing coins during the event period.
  • Point Conversion
  1. Every 10,000 Coins Purchased = 100 Event Points
  • Participation Criteria
  1. To unlock leaderboard rewards, users must recharge at least: 
    🔓 50,000 Coins
Users below 50,000 recharge:
  1. Cannot enter ranking rewards
  2. Cannot receive bonus rewards
  •  Leaderboard Rules
  1. Rankings are based on total Event Points earned during the event
  2. More points = Higher rank
  3. Leaderboard updates in daily 12:00 AM
exclusiveDesc: For everyone participating in the event.
